requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Kuwait Fire Force Approval and Project Fire Engineering
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——科威特消防局审批及项目消防工程
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——科威特消防局審批及項目消防工程

summary.en: Kuwait Fire Force (KFF) is the fire authority for fire prevention, licensing, and civil protection approvals in Kuwait. A public Kuwait BESS-specific fire code or formal KFF adoption notice for a stationary energy storage standard was not confirmed as of the dataset date. For commercial, industrial, and utility BESS projects, fire-safety acceptance should therefore be handled through direct KFF/project engagement and local fire-engineering review. Project specifications may require evidence aligned with IEC 62933-5-2 system safety, IEC 62040 where UPS-type battery systems are within scope, and internationally used stationary energy storage fire-risk practices. Chinese GB/T fire and system-safety evidence is not accepted by itself as Kuwait installation approval.
summary.zh: 科威特消防局（KFF）是科威特消防预防、许可和民防审批的主管机关。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认公开的科威特BESS专项消防规范或KFF正式采纳固定式储能标准的公告。对于商业、工业和公用事业BESS项目，消防安全验收应通过直接与KFF/项目方沟通及本地消防工程审查处理。项目规格可能要求符合IEC 62933-5-2系统安全、在UPS类电池系统适用时符合IEC 62040，以及国际通行固定式储能消防风险做法的证据。中国GB/T消防和系统安全证据本身不被视为科威特安装批准。
summary.zht: 科威特消防局（KFF）是科威特消防預防、許可和民防審批的主管機關。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認公開的科威特BESS專項消防規範或KFF正式採納固定式儲能標準的公告。對於商業、工業和公用事業BESS項目，消防安全驗收應通過直接與KFF/項目方溝通及本地消防工程審查處理。項目規格可能要求符合IEC 62933-5-2系統安全、在UPS類電池系統適用時符合IEC 62040，以及國際通行固定式儲能消防風險做法的證據。中國GB/T消防和系統安全證據本身不被視為科威特安裝批准。

standards_or_laws: Kuwait Fire Force (KFF) — fire prevention, licensing, and installation approval authority
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62040 series — Uninterruptible power systems (relevant where the BESS/UPS installation scope overlaps)
Project-specific fire-engineering requirements issued by KFF, the owner, insurer, or EPC

summary.en: China BESS fire and system-safety documentation commonly references GB/T 36558-2023 for electrochemical energy storage systems and related domestic project fire-safety review. These documents can help describe the system design, thermal-runaway controls, alarms, ventilation, fire detection, and suppression strategy. They do not replace Kuwait Fire Force approval, local fire-engineering calculations, or project-specific requirements for separation distances, emergency response, battery room or container layout, and suppression interfaces.
summary.zh: 中国BESS消防和系统安全文件通常引用GB/T 36558-2023电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件及相关国内项目消防审查。这些文件可用于说明系统设计、热失控控制、报警、通风、火灾探测和抑制策略，但不能替代科威特消防局审批、本地消防工程计算，或关于隔离距离、应急响应、电池室或集装箱布局、抑制系统接口的项目专属要求。
summary.zht: 中國BESS消防和系統安全文件通常引用GB/T 36558-2023電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件及相關國內項目消防審查。這些文件可用於說明系統設計、熱失控控制、警報、通風、火災探測和抑制策略，但不能替代科威特消防局審批、本地消防工程計算，或關於隔離距離、應急響應、電池室或貨櫃布局、抑制系統接口的項目專屬要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (includes system-level safety requirements)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (grid-connected system requirements)
Chinese project-level fire-safety review and local authority procedures

gap.en: Gap: Kuwait installation approval is local and project-specific. Exporters and EPCs should engage KFF or a Kuwait-licensed fire consultant before final layout, confirm the applicable fire code basis, prepare IEC 62933-5-2-aligned hazard analysis, document thermal-runaway mitigation, ventilation or gas detection, emergency shutdown, suppression and alarm interfaces, access clearances, and emergency response procedures, and verify any insurer or owner requirements in addition to KFF review.
gap.zh: 差距：科威特安装审批具有本地和项目专属性。出口商和EPC应在最终布局前与KFF或科威特持牌消防顾问接触，确认适用消防规范基础，准备符合IEC 62933-5-2思路的危害分析，记录热失控缓解、通风或气体探测、紧急停机、抑制和报警接口、通道净距及应急响应程序，并核实KFF审查之外的保险人或业主要求。
gap.zht: 差距：科威特安裝審批具有本地和項目專屬性。出口商和EPC應在最終布局前與KFF或科威特持牌消防顧問接觸，確認適用消防規範基礎，準備符合IEC 62933-5-2思路的危害分析，記錄熱失控緩解、通風或氣體探測、緊急停機、抑制和警報接口、通道淨距及應急響應程序，並核實KFF審查之外的保險人或業主要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for commercial, industrial, and utility installations requiring KFF fire-safety approval; BESS-specific public Kuwait fire code not confirmed as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T fire-safety files are not Kuwait installation approval. Treat KFF engagement as a project gate, confirm the applicable fire basis directly, and prepare local fire-engineering documentation aligned with IEC 62933-5-2 and any owner, insurer, or EPC requirements before the BESS layout is frozen.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T消防安全文件不是科威特安装批准。应将KFF沟通视为项目门槛，直接确认适用消防依据，并在BESS布局冻结前准备符合IEC 62933-5-2及任何业主、保险人或EPC要求的本地消防工程文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T消防安全文件不是科威特安裝批准。應將KFF溝通視為項目門檻，直接確認適用消防依據，並在BESS布局凍結前準備符合IEC 62933-5-2及任何業主、保險人或EPC要求的本地消防工程文件。
